result:
The data cleaning and harmonization process has been successfully completed. The cleaned dataset containing the NS-SEC occupational class variables for mothers and fathers across waves 14-18 has been output to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The file includes the following variables:

- NSID (cohort member identifier)
- nssecma14, nssecpa14 (mother's and father's NS-SEC at age 14)
- nssecma15, nssecpa15 (mother's and father's NS-SEC at age 15)
- nssecma16, nssecpa16 (mother's and father's NS-SEC at age 16)
- nssecma17, nssecpa17 (mother's and father's NS-SEC at age 17)
- nssecma18, nssecpa18 (mother's and father's NS-SEC at age 18)

All variables have been properly harmonized according to the 17-category NS-SEC classification with appropriate missing value codes.
